title: Kharik Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kharik, with a Z-Score of +4.66. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kharik is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 15.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 59%, and the wind speed is approximately 5.4 km/h. 
 The lack of significant wind and high humidity is exacerbating the heat wave's effects, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
